Current text: "SAMPLE APPS GET INVOLVED MONITORING A FULL-STACK SAMPLE WEB APPLICATION BUILT ON TOP OF ASPECTRAN AND MYBATIS JPetStore Demo The goal of the JPetStore Demo App is to provide and demonstrate a sample web application that leverages Aspectran and MyBatis.
